## oak install cluster

Install the Oakestra cluster orchestrator

### Synopsis

Install the Oakestra cluster orchestrator on this machine.

Requires Docker with Compose support.
Optionally specify a version tag (e.g. v0.4.400).

```
oak install cluster [version] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for cluster
  -y, --yes    Skip confirmation prompt
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --root   Run install scripts with sudo
```
